scripts.clean:caches: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$paths=@('target\\debug\\incremental','backend\\target\\debug\\incremental','desktop\\src-tauri\\target_desktop\\debug\\incremental'); foreach($p in $paths){ if(Test-Path $p){ Remove-Item -LiteralPath $p -Recurse -Force } }; Write-Host 'Incremental caches cleaned.'"
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && cargo watch -w core/src -w server/src -w core/Cargo.toml -w server/Cargo.toml -w Cargo.toml -x 'run -p whylowdps-server'
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run ensure:frontend && npm run ensure:cargo && npm run ensure:tauri-build && cd desktop && cross-env DESKTOP_BUILD=true NEXT_PUBLIC_DESKTOP_BUILD=true tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.desktop:debug: npm run ensure:frontend && npm run ensure:cargo && npm run ensure:tauri-build && cd desktop && cross-env DESKTOP_BUILD=true NEXT_PUBLIC_DESKTOP_BUILD=true RUST_LOG=debug RUST_BACKTRACE=1 tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.desktop:build: npm run ensure:tauri-build && cd desktop && cross-env DESKTOP_BUILD=true NEXT_PUBLIC_DESKTOP_BUILD=true tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
